data.body: CORE PROBLEM: --diff-filter=U (unmerged files) is used as a proxy for 'merge in progress with conflicts' but these are orthogonal: MERGE_HEAD exists = merge in progress, --diff-filter=U non-empty = unresolved conflicts. After auto-resolution, MERGE_HEAD still exists but --diff-filter=U is empty. Components have interdependent assumptions about when MERGE_HEAD exists and what --diff-filter=U means. PROPOSED APPROACH: Design a unified merge-state API that all components consume, centralizing 'in merge', 'has conflicts', and 'resolved but not committed' into one authoritative source. RELATED: dso-vcrq, 1ded-89e6, a45c-400e.
